A function to determine the status of a number as prime or composite can be constructed using modulus. * * *  
The function checks if a number is divisible by any integer other than 1 and itself. *  
The modulus operator is used to determine if a number is prime or composite. * * *  
A number is considered composite if it has a divisor other than 1 and itself. *  
The function returns the status of the number as prime or composite. *
